isi.lyrics_timestamp:
[Verse 1: JIHYO]
I just don't know why I think of you when I close my eyes
How you love to stay on my mind
Swear I said goodbye something to a hundred times
Must've been my favorite lie
He must be an angel, lovestruck if you can't tell
I think I've found a reason to believe I'm under his spell
I wish somebody warned us, when did he get this gorgeous?
Now I'm running 'round in circles, brainstorming how to solve this

[Pre-Chorus: Jenevieve]
Ready or not (Come on), baby, let's roll (Baby, let's roll)
We got ways to go-ooh-woah-ooh-woah-ooh-woah (Oh)

[Chorus: Jenevieve & JIHYO]
Keep workin' me (Uh-huh), that's that shit that works for me
Oh, so heavenly, S-O H-E-avenly
Keep workin' me (Uh-huh), that's that shit that works for me
Oh, so heavenly, S-O H-E-avenly

[Verse 2: Jenevieve & JIHYO]
Ooh-ooh
I'm so into you, you're my type
And I, I, I, yeah, I'm telling you
I wanna stay high like heaven, heaven high
Oh, baby, stayin' alive
Oh, yeah, tonight is the night
Ooh, baby, won't leave you behind, yeah

[Pre-Chorus: JIHYO & Jenevieve]
Take me in your arms and don't let me go
Like there won't be tomorrow-ooh-woah-ooh-woah-ooh-woah (Oh)

[Chorus: Jenevieve & JIHYO]
Keep workin' me (Uh-huh), that's that shit that works for me
Oh, so heavenly, S-O H-E-heavenly
Keep workin' me (Uh-huh), that's that shit that works for me
Oh, so heavenly, S-O H-E-heavenly

[Verse 3: Jenevieve]
In the night, we do our thing
On the level, we keep goin' up (Up, up, up)
We're goin' up
Baby, pull up in that thing
I just love the way you lift me up (Up, up, up)
Baby, lift me up

[Chorus: Jenevieve & JIHYO]
Keep workin' me (Uh-huh), that's that shit that works for me
Oh, so heavenly, S-O H-E-avenly
Keep workin' me (Uh-huh), that's that shit that works for me
Oh, so heavenly, S-O H-E-avenly
Keep workin' me (Uh-huh), that's that shit that works for me
Oh, so heavenly, S-O H-E-avenly
